```{r, echo=FALSE, results="hide"}
repeat {
  a <- sample(2:8,1); k <- sample(1:4,1); p <- sample(seq(0.10,0.90,0.05),1)
  q <- a*p^(1/(k+1))
  vals <- round(c(q,a*p,a*(1-p)^(1/(k+1)),p/a,a*p^(k+1)),4)
  if (length(unique(vals)) == 5L) break
}
opts <- sprintf("$%.4f$",vals)
```

Question
========
Se $F_X(x)=(x/`r a`)^{`r k+1`}$ para $0<x<`r a`$, qual é o quantil de ordem $p=`r p`$?

Answerlist
----------
* `r opts[1]`
* `r opts[2]`
* `r opts[3]`
* `r opts[4]`
* `r opts[5]`

Solution
========
Resolve-se $F_X(q_p)=p$:
$$\left(\frac{q_p}{`r a`}\right)^{`r k+1`}=`r p`,
\qquad q_p=`r a`\,p^{1/`r k+1`}
=`r sprintf("%.4f",q)`.$$

Meta-information
================
exname: Cap1S7Q4_quantile_continuo
extype: schoice
exsolution: 10000
exshuffle: TRUE
